title: vaccinium cubense subsp. ramonii
intro: Vaccinium cubense subsp. ramonii, also known as the Guatemalan blueberry, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It has been reported to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, which can be attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and other phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Vaccinium cubense subsp. ramonii include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Vaccinium cubense subsp. ramonii can be used to prepare various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed for their medicinal and nutritional values.
